snippet.title: ஆடி முதல் வெள்ளி 🔥 அம்மன் அருள் பெற கேட்க வேண்டிய பாடல்கள் | Best Amman Songs
snippet.description:
ஆடி மாதத்தின் முதல் வெள்ளிக்கிழமையில் அம்பாளின் அருளைப் பெற மனமார கேட்க வேண்டிய சக்தி வாய்ந்த அம்மன் பாடல்கள் தொகுப்பு.

இந்த பக்தி பாடல்கள் அம்மனின் அருளையும், குடும்ப நலனையும், ஆரோக்கியத்தையும், செல்வ வளத்தையும் வேண்டி கேட்க ஏற்றவை.

🙏 அனைவருக்கும் இனிய ஆடி வெள்ளி நல்வாழ்த்துக்கள்.

🌺 Aadi First Friday Amman Songs | Powerful Tamil Devotional Collection 🌺

Celebrate the divine blessings of Aadi Month with this soulful collection of powerful Amman devotional songs. Listening to Amman songs on the first Friday of Aadi is believed to invoke the grace of Goddess Mariamman and bring peace, prosperity, good health, and protection to the entire family.

This special collection features timeless devotional hits by legendary singers including Veeramanidasan, P. Susheela, S. Janaki, Pushpavanam Kuppusamy, Srihari, Sakthidasan, and Jayashree.

🙏 May Goddess Amman bless you and your family with happiness, prosperity, health, and success.

🎵 Songs List

00:00 Adi Velliyile
04:47 Maruvathuril Vazhum
09:37 Muthumari Pattu Chattham
17:24 Manjal Mugam
24:18 Thaye Unn Thayave
30:09 Kollidatthil
36:30 Patchai Pasungiliye
41:20 Sri Rangadesam
46:49 Sandhanappoo
52:52 Pournami Oliyai

#AadiVelli #AmmanSongs #AadiMonth #TamilDevotionalSongs #Mariamman #Karumariamman #BhakthiSongs #TamilBakthi #AmmanDevotional #Veeramanidasan #PSusheela #SJanaki

snippet.title: HAQ movie Yami Gautam, Emraan Hashmi, Vartika Singh, Danish Husain, Sheeba Chadha, Aseem Hattangady
snippet.description:
Her fight for justice starts today!
#HaqTrailer out now

Shazia Bano takes her husband Abbas to court after he abandons her and their children, sparking a national battle over faith, women’s rights, and justice. Inspired by A landmark Supreme Court judgement. Haq is the story of one woman’s fight for her rights and justice.

snippet.title: KALA HIRAN | OFFICIAL TEASER | BHARAT S. SHRINATE | AMIT JANI |
snippet.description:
KALA HIRAN - Official Teaser  | Jani Firefox Films
The wait is finally over! The highly anticipated teaser of KALA HIRAN, which the world has been waiting for with bated breath, is officially released worldwide today, July 17th.

About the Teaser
Step into a gripping courtroom drama that unravels a chilling tale. The teaser showcases the shocking cruelty of a ruthless hunter who mercilessly guns down two innocent blackbucks. The thrill intensifies as the courtroom trial begins, revealing dark secrets of witness intimidation and terrifying death threats made to a driver and his entire family.
While the film's narrative is a work of fiction, this intense crime thriller does more than just keep you on the edge of your seat—it also beautifully highlights the Bishnoi community's profound love, deep connection, and emotional devotion to nature and wildlife.
Release Details:
Get ready for a massive cinematic experience! Jani Firefox Films will soon be releasing the Kala Hiran movie in over 8,000 cinemas across the country and around the globe.
Stay tuned for more updates and get ready to witness the truth unfold on the big screen!

snippet.title: 4,00,000 UC FERRARI OPENING 🏎️ | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢

snippet.title: प्यार तो होता है प्यार | Parwana | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan Songs | Ajay Devgan
snippet.description:
2000 के दशक का वह सुनहरा दौर जब संगीत सीधे दिल को छू जाता था। अलका याग्निक और उदित नारायण की मखमली आवाजें आज भी प्यार की परिभाषा को नया अर्थ देती हैं। फिल्म 'परवाना' का यह गीत 'प्यार तो होता है प्यार' उस दौर की सबसे खूबसूरत रोमांटिक यादों में से एक है। 



Credits :

Song: Pyar To Hota Hai Pyar
Album: Parwana
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Sanjeev-Darshan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

na shahar me hua na hi ghar me hua
pyaar to bas hua ik nazar me hua
ye to aaye nazar dil ke paar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
na shahar me hua na hi ghar me hua
pyaar to bas hua ik nazar me hua
ye to aaye nazar dil ke paar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar

har saans me ab teri baat hai, meri zindagi ab mere sath hai
tu ban gayi hai zarurat meri, tere liye hai mohabbat meri
maine suna isko tune suna, ye ishq hai dhadkano ki sada
dil pe chhaaya hai iska khumaar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
sun mere yaara yaara yaa raa
sun mere yaara yaara yaa raa

aisa kabhi pehle hota na tha, mera chain to aise khota na tha
kaise huyi aisi haalat meri, paagal banaati hai chaahat teri
tujhko khabar na mujhe tha pata, is dard ki na koi hai dava
ham to rahne lage beqraar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
na shahar me hua na hi ghar me hua
pyaar to bas hua ik nazar me hua
ye to aaye nazar dil ke paar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar
pyaar to hota hai pyaar, pyaar to hota hai pyaar

इस दिलकश गाने को सुनकर पुरानी यादें ताजा हो जाती हैं। आपको यह गाना कैसा लगा? अपना पसंदीदा रोमांटिक गाना कमेंट बॉक्स में जरूर बताएं। अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आया तो इसे लाइक करें, दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करें और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।
